overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player character moves from an open street beneath an elevated highway, through a covered commercial walkway dense with holographic advertisements, and emerges into an open plaza with trees and food vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street beneath elevated highway with neon storefronts

events.description: futuristic vehicle passes by on the right side of the street
passing a pedestrian walking in the same direction on the left sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, observing the neon-lit storefronts and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera
futuristic car driving past on the street to the right

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass covering the street overhead with ribbed metal underside
commercial building with glowing teal neon signage reading CHILLAX
bright yellow support columns lining the left side of the sidewalk
large illuminated advertisements on the left wall showing various products

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking beneath a massive elevated highway in a futuristic city at night. The street is lined with yellow structural beams on the left and neon-lit commercial buildings on the right. A pedestrian walks ahead on the sidewalk while futuristic vehicles pass by on the wet street, reflecting the neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with dense neon signage and vending machines

events.description: entering enclosed covered walkway from the open street under the highway
lighting shifts to predominantly neon magenta and cyan as moving deeper into the arcade

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow covered corridor lined with glowing vending machines and holographic advertisements overhead

entered.detail: enclosed metal roof structure covering the pedestrian path with industrial beams
bright green neon sign for Turbo Delight shop with glowing border
row of glowing red and cyan vending machines with illuminated displays
large holographic advertisement for Mindfuck product with purple graphics
blue-tinted glass building wall with reflections of neon lights

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow covered walkway completely enclosed by walls and an overhead roof. The space is densely packed with neon-lit vending machines on the left, a glass facade on the right, and massive holographic billboards overhead displaying advertisements. The lighting becomes intensely colorful with magenta and cyan neon dominating the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with street crossing and food vendors

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open plaza area with visible sky and trees
crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk on the wet street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet street and entering an open plaza area with trees, food vendors, and stairs leading upward

notable_agents.action: person in purple top and shorts standing near the crosswalk
car with headlights on approaching the intersection in the distance

entered.detail: wide open urban square with visible sky and scattered trees
yellow and white painted pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
large mature trees with illuminated trunks and branches
illuminated food vendor cart with warm orange lighting and canopy
wide concrete staircase leading up to a higher level of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens as the camera exits the enclosed walkway into a spacious open plaza. The scene features a wet street crossing with yellow zebra stripes, illuminated food vendor carts, and large trees with uplighting. The camera crosses the street and approaches a wide staircase leading to an upper plaza level, with modern buildings and digital billboards visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide urban thoroughfare through a claustrophobic neon corridor and into an expansive open plaza. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, moving past yellow structural beams and neon buildings while futuristic vehicles glide across a wet, reflective street. As the camera advances, the environment shifts into a narrow covered walkway enclosed by walls and a roof, where the lighting becomes intensely colorful with magenta and cyan hues from dense vending machines and overhead holographic billboards. The scene then opens up as the camera exits the corridor and emerges into a spacious plaza featuring illuminated food carts and uplit trees. Finally, the movement carries across a wet zebra-stripe crossing toward a wide staircase leading to an upper level, with modern buildings and digital displays looming in the background.
